generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp stamped when default.json was last regenerated.

id.description: Unique slug identifying the pack across the registry.

kind.description: Pack kind. v1 accepts persona only in practice; instrument reserved.

name.description: Human-readable label shown in pack listings.

description.description: One or two sentence summary of the pack.

repo.description: GitHub owner/name of the repo hosting the pack YAML. Must be public.

path.description: Repo-relative path to the pack YAML file.

ref.description: Optional git tag, branch, or sha. Absent means 'main'.

version.description: Optional pack version string, mirrors the pack's top-level version: field.

github.description: Public GitHub handle of the pack author.

added_at.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) stamped by the reviewer on merge.

calibration.description: Reserved for future calibration fingerprint summaries on the registry entry. Always null in v1; per-pack calibration runs live on the pack YAML's `calibration:` list and are summarized here as `calibration_count`.

calibration_count.description: Optional. Number of calibration runs declared on the pack's `calibration:` list. Omitted (or zero) means the pack is uncalibrated, which is a valid state — see CONTRIBUTING.md for which packs should and should not calibrate.
